gt_sql: SELECT AVG(T2.`aCL IgG`) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) >= 50 AND T1.Admission = '+'
pred_sql:
SELECT AVG(T2.`aCL IgG`) 
FROM Patient AS T1 
INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID 
WHERE T1.Admission = '+' 
AND CAST(strftime('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', T1.Birthday) AS INTEGER) >= 50
question: For in-patient age 50 and above, what is their average anti-cardiolipin antibody (IgG) concentration?
